headline: Is Public Service Enterprise Group (PEG) a Top Utility Stock on Earnings Growth Prospects?
summary: Public Service Enterprise Group Incorporated (NYSE:PEG) is one of the top utility stocks to buy now. On April 13, BMO Capital reiterated a Market Perform rating on Public Service Enterprise Group Incorporated (NYSE:PEG) and raised its price target to $91 from $90. The research firm expects limited updates on the company during the upcoming earnings […]

headline: PSEG Long Island Celebrates National Lineworker Appreciation Day
summary: In honor of National Lineworker Appreciation Day on April 18, PSEG Long Island is taking the time to recognize the diligent effort its field workforce puts in to keep the power on.
